timeModel.designIntent: Farm-style readable waits create time for parallel planning, purchasing, hiring, and other station work.

planning_desk.name: Planning Desk
planning_desk.mission: Release a customer traveler and choose the next achievable operation.
planning_desk.details: Customer demand, routing, due dates, capacity, and job status begin here.

nox_terminal.name: NOX Material Terminal
nox_terminal.mission: Order certified material that matches the active job.
nox_terminal.details: Compare alloy, condition, stock form, certification, quantity, and landed cost.

nox_pallet.name: Receiving
nox_pallet.mission: Verify delivered stock before it enters production.
nox_pallet.details: Match the purchase record, alloy, dimensions, quantity, condition, and certification.

saw_t1.name: Bandsaw
saw_t1.mission: Set the traveler cut length, start the saw, then collect and label the finished blank.
saw_t1.details: The bandsaw converts delivered raw stock into a controlled CNC blank with finish allowance.

tool_cart.name: Tool Cart
tool_cart.mission: Select, gauge, and install the complete three-tool CNC kit.
tool_cart.details: Tool choice, stickout, probe length, and chamfer-tool length determine whether the setup is safe.

presetter_t4.name: Tool Presetter
presetter_t4.mission: Measure tool length and diameter before controlled release.
presetter_t4.details: Presetting keeps offsets traceable and reduces spindle time spent measuring tools.

toolcrib_rfid_t4.name: RFID Tool Crib
toolcrib_rfid_t4.mission: Issue the correct controlled tool and preserve its identity.
toolcrib_rfid_t4.details: The crib tracks tool location, life, calibration, and approved substitutions.

vmc_t2.name: Vertical Machining Center
vmc_t2.mission: Prove true G/M code, run the cycle, then inspect the completed part.
vmc_t2.details: Workholding, offsets, tools, spindle direction, coolant, rapid motion, and cutting feeds must agree.

lathe_cnc_t2.name: CNC Lathe
lathe_cnc_t2.mission: Inspect chuck pressure, stock stickout, turret clearance, and the program.
lathe_cnc_t2.details: The lathe rotates stock against controlled tools for turned diameters, faces, grooves, and threads.

mill_manual_t1.name: Manual Mill
mill_manual_t1.mission: Verify workholding, position, clearance, spindle selection, and safe stopping.
mill_manual_t1.details: Manual machining develops judgment about forces, references, feeds, depths, and direct control.

bench_deburr_t1.name: Deburr Bench
bench_deburr_t1.mission: Break required edges without damaging controlled features.
bench_deburr_t1.details: Deburring makes a part safe to handle and prepares it for reliable inspection and assembly.

network_node_t3.name: MTConnect Node
network_node_t3.mission: Confirm running, idle, stopped, and faulted signals match physical reality.
network_node_t3.details: Connected machine states support honest uptime, cycle, downtime, and bottleneck analysis.

handoff_terminal_t4.name: JobLine Handoff Terminal
handoff_terminal_t4.mission: Record completed work, quality concerns, and the exact next action.
handoff_terminal_t4.details: A clean handoff gives the next employee enough context to continue safely without guessing.

whiteboard.name: Mission Board
whiteboard.mission: Review the chapter goal, completed tasks, quality gate, and next achievable step.
whiteboard.details: The mission board is the source of truth when the player is unsure where to go next.

chalkboard.name: Shop Class
chalkboard.mission: Review the manufacturing principle behind the current task.
chalkboard.details: Shop Class explains why a process works and provides recovery teaching after mistakes.

cobot_t5.name: Collaborative Robot
cobot_t5.mission: Review guarding, payload, reach, end effector, and validated handoff behavior.
cobot_t5.details: Cobots automate proven standard work; they do not correct an unstable process.

amr_t5.name: Autonomous Mobile Robot
amr_t5.mission: Review route clearance, traffic rules, payload identity, and safe stops.
amr_t5.details: AMRs move identified material between departments without blocking people or emergency access.

restroom_station.name: Employee Restroom
restroom_station.mission: Inspect shared facilities and restore service safely when maintenance is required.
restroom_station.details: Reliable factories maintain utilities and people spaces as carefully as production equipment.
